featureType.name: MaC_3-6_Furneaux_seagrass_C_stocks
featureType.title: Carbon stocks of temperate subtidal seagrass in Tayaritja (Furneaux Group), Tasmania
featureType.abstract: This layer displays seagrass sediment carbon stock sampling sites around Tayaritja / Flinders Island in the Furneaux Group, Tasmania. Each point represents a field sampling location where sediment cores were collected from seagrass habitat and used to estimate mean organic carbon stock within the upper 50 cm of sediment. Points are symbolised by the mean biomass of organic carbon stock.
featureType.nativeCRS: GEOGCS["WGS 84", DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984", SPHEROID["WGS 84", 6378137.0, 298.257223563, AUTHORITY["EPSG","7030"]], AUTHORITY["EPSG","6326"]], PRIMEM["Greenwich", 0.0, AUTHORITY["EPSG","8901"]], UNIT["degree", 0.017453292519943295], AXIS["Geodetic longitude", EAST], AXIS["Geodetic latitude", NORTH], AUTHORITY["EPSG","4326"]]
